titleEn: Komet Invests in Irrigation Intelligence to Close One of Agriculture’s Biggest Data Gaps
titleZh: 科迈特投资灌溉智能技术，填补农业最大数据空白之一
summaryZh: 科迈特灌溉公司投资六位数欧元成立新部门“应用工程与数字系统部”，并建立“科迈特体验中心”，旨在通过科学测量和可重复数据，研究喷灌系统从喷头到作物的全过程性能，解决灌溉决策长期依赖经验、缺乏数据支撑的问题，推动全球喷灌科学和决策进步。
translationZh:
科迈特灌溉公司的新“应用工程与数字系统部”和“体验中心”将生成全球相关的洞察，以推动喷灌科学、工程和决策的进步。

随着全球农业面临提高生产力、适应气候波动和管理日益稀缺的水资源的压力日益增大，生产系统中一个关键部分却仍然出人意料地缺乏测量：喷灌本身。虽然现代农业受益于与遗传学、肥料方案、作物保护和机械性能相关的复杂数据，但灌溉决策仍然严重依赖经验、目视观察以及数十年田间实践中形成的假设。

科迈特灌溉公司，这家奥地利跨国企业、全球喷灌精准喷头和末端系统解决方案的领导者，认为这种情况必须改变。今天，该公司宣布了一项六位数的重大投资，用于成立新的“应用工程与数字系统部”，同时启动“科迈特体验中心”——一项旨在生成推动全球灌溉性能提升所需的数据、洞察和工程知识的新全球能力。

由全球创新总监古斯塔沃·霍斯里领导的新部门整合了工程、测试、诊断和数字创新，其明确目标是：帮助行业更好地理解从喷头到作物之间发生的事情。

“农业的未来将依赖于更好的决策，”科迈特灌溉公司首席执行官安德烈·格罗斯表示。“农业已经变得越来越数据驱动，但灌溉仍然是作物生产中测量最少的变量之一。我们相信，下一代的进步不仅来自更好的产品，也来自更好的信息。”

这项投资包括建立“科迈特体验中心”，这是一个先进的研究、测试、培训和演示环境，旨在以前所未有的细节研究灌溉性能。该设施将支持开发新的方法、诊断工具和性能指标，帮助种植者、经销商、原始设备制造商和灌溉专业人士做出更明智的决策。

几十年来，诸如喷头磨损如何影响性能、何时应更换组件、环境条件如何影响水输送、以及如何优化灌溉系统等问题，往往通过经验和观察来回答。科迈特的新能力旨在为这些问题带来科学测量和可重复的数据。

“行业中许多最重要的决策仍然是在有限的可测量信息下做出的，”霍斯里说。“我们的目标是生成数据、指标和洞察，让种植者和合作伙伴能够更有信心地做出决策。我们正在从观察转向

**Komet Irrigation 分享**

Komet Irrigation 新成立的“应用工程与数字系统”部门及“Komet 体验中心”将生成具有全球影响力的洞见，以推动中心支轴灌溉的科学、工程与决策发展。随着全球农业面临提高生产力、适应气候波动以及管理日益稀缺的水资源的压力日益增大，生产系统中一个关键环节却仍然出人意料地缺乏测量：即中心支轴灌溉本身。尽管现代农业受益于与遗传学、肥料方案、作物保护及机械性能相关的复杂数据，但灌溉决策在很大程度上仍依赖于经验、目视观察以及数十年来在田间形成的假设。作为中心支轴灌溉领域精密喷头及系统末端解决方案的全球领导者，奥地利跨国公司 Komet Irrigation 认为这一现状必须改变。今日，公司宣布对其新的“应用工程与数字系统”部门进行一笔高达六位数的重大投资，同时启动“Komet 体验中心”，这是一个全新的全球性机构，旨在生成推动全球灌溉性能提升所需的数据、洞见和工程知识。

由全球创新总监 Gustavo Hossri 领导的这个新部门，整合了工程、测试、诊断和数字创新，其明确目标是：帮助行业更好地理解喷头与作物之间发生的情况。“农业的未来将依赖于更明智的决策，”Komet Irrigation 首席执行官 Andree Groos 表示。“农业已日益成为数据驱动型产业，然而灌溉仍然是作物生产中测量最少的变量之一。我们相信，下一代的进步不仅将来自更好的产品，更将来自更优质的信息。”这项投资包括建立“Komet 体验中心”，这是一个先进的研究、测试、培训和演示环境，旨在以前所未有的细节研究灌溉性能。该设施将支持开发新的方法、诊断工具和性能指标，帮助种植者、经销商、原始设备制造商和灌溉专业人士做出更明智的决策。

数十年来，诸如喷头磨损如何影响性能、何时应更换部件、环境条件如何影响输水、以及如何优化灌溉系统等问题，通常都是通过经验和观察来回答的。Komet 的新能力旨在为这些问题引入科学测量和可重复数据。“行业内许多最重要的决策仍然是在有限的可测量信息下做出的，”Hossri 说。“我们的目标是生成数据、指标和洞见，让种植者和合作伙伴能够更有信心地做出决策。我们正从观察走向测量，从假设走向证据。”虽然体验中心位于巴西，但公司强调，该举措在目的和应用上都是全球性的。选择巴西是因为其先进的农业部门、拥有受过高等教育的农艺师和工程师、多样化的运营环境，以及与世界上一些最高产农业系统的相关性。通过该设施产生的知识将在 Komet 的全球网络中共享，并用于支持世界各地的种植者和合作伙伴。

这项投资也反映了 Komet 创新方法的更广泛演变。除了开发行业领先的喷头技术外，公司正在扩展到诊断、性能智能、数字服务和数据驱动的决策支持领域。通过新部门开发的未来产品将帮助客户更好地理解灌溉系统性能、优化运营效率并改善长期决策。体验中心已经吸引了灌溉专家、种植者、原始设备制造商、经销商和行业合作伙伴的极大兴趣，一些参观者花费数小时探索该设施及其功能。6月26日，Komet 将在巴西正式启用体验中心，届时将汇聚来自世界各地的行业领袖、种植者、研究人员、合作伙伴、政府代表和媒体。“在全世界努力养活不断增长的人口，同时应对日益复杂的环境挑战之际，水将成为农业最具战略意义的资源之一，”Groos 补充道。“我们相信，未来属于那些了解得更多，从而能更明智地使用资源的人。这项投资就是为了帮助我们的行业建设那样的未来。”

0 1 5 Komet 投资灌溉智能以填补农业最大的数据空白之一

成立于1952年，总部位于奥地利利恩茨，Komet Irrigation 是机械化灌溉精准施水领域的全球专家。在此查看所有作者故事。主题：首页精选
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了灌溉领域从经验驱动向数据驱动转型的典型实践，其方法论（建立专门部门、体验中心、聚焦喷头到作物之间的数据空白）对智慧畜牧中养殖环境控制、精准饲喂等环节的数据化升级具有直接借鉴意义。
contentFull: By Komet Irrigation Share Komet Irrigation’s new Application Engineering & Digital Systems division and Experience Hub will generate globally relevant insights to advance pivot irrigation science, engineering, and decision-making. As global agriculture faces growing pressure to improve productivity, adapt to climate volatility, and manage increasingly scarce water resources, one critical part of the production system remains surprisingly under-measured: pivot irrigation itself. While modern agriculture benefits from sophisticated data relating to genetics, fertilizer programs, crop protection, and machinery performance, irrigation decisions continue to rely heavily on experience, visual observation, and assumptions developed over decades in the field. Komet Irrigation, the Austrian multinational and global leader in precision sprinkler and end-of-system-solutions for pivot irrigation, believes that must change. Today, the company announced a significant six-figure investment in a new Application Engineering & Digital Systems division, alongside the launch of the Komet Experience Hub, a new global capability designed to generate the data, insights, and engineering knowledge needed to advance irrigation performance worldwide. Top Articles Read More Read More Read More Read More Read More UC Riverside Develops Modern-Day Robotic Divining Rod Led by Global Innovation Director, Gustavo Hossri, the new division brings together engineering, testing, diagnostics, and digital innovation with a clear objective: helping the industry better understand what happens between the sprinkler and the crop. “The future of agriculture will depend on better decisions,” said Andree Groos, CEO of Komet Irrigation. “Agriculture has become increasingly data-driven, yet irrigation remains one of the least measured variables in crop production. We believe the next generation of progress will come not only from better products, but from better information.” The investment includes the establishment of the Komet Experience Hub, an advanced research, testing, training, and demonstration environment designed to study irrigation performance in unprecedented detail. The facility will support the development of new methodologies, diagnostics, and performance metrics that help growers, dealers, OEMs, and irrigation professionals make more informed decisions. For decades, questions such as how sprinkler wear affects performance, when components should be replaced, how environmental conditions influence water delivery, and how irrigation systems can be optimized have often been answered through experience and observation. Komet’s new capability seeks to bring scientific measurement and repeatable data to these questions. “Many of the industry’s most important decisions are still made with limited measurable information,” said Hossri. “Our goal is to generate data, metrics, and insights that allow growers and partners to make decisions with greater confidence. We are moving from observation to measurement, and from assumptions to evidence.” While the Experience Hub is in Brazil, the company emphasizes that the initiative is global in both purpose and application. Brazil was selected because of its advanced agricultural sector, the availability of top educated agronomists and engineers, diverse operating environments, and relevance to some of the world’s most productive farming systems. The knowledge generated through the facility will be shared across Komet’s global network and used to support growers and partners around the world. The investment also reflects a broader evolution in Komet’s approach to innovation. Beyond developing industry-leading sprinkler technologies, the company is expanding into diagnostics, performance intelligence, digital services, and data-driven decision support. Future offerings developed through the new division will help customers better understand irrigation system performance, optimize operational efficiency, and improve long-term decision-making. Already, Experience Hub has attracted significant interest from irrigation experts, growers, OEMs, dealers, and industry partners, with some visitors spending several hours exploring the facility and its capabilities. On 26 June, Komet will officially inaugurate the Experience Hub in Brazil, bringing together industry leaders, growers, researchers, partners, government representatives, and media from around the world. “As the world works to feed a growing population while managing increasingly complex environmental challenges, water will become one of agriculture’s most strategic resources,” added Groos. “We believe the future belongs to those who understand more, so they can use resources more intelligently. This investment is about helping our industry build that future.” 0 1 5 Komet Invests in Irrigation Intelligence to Close One of Agriculture's Biggest Data Gaps Subscribe Today For Subscribe Founded in 1952 and headquartered in Lienz, Austria, Komet Irrigation is a global specialist in precision water application for mechanized irrigation. author: Matt Hopkins
contentHtml:
New Application Engineering & Digital Systems division and Experience Hub will generate globally relevant insights to advance pivot irrigation science, engineering, and decision-making.
The post Komet Invests in Irrigation Intelligence to Close One of Agriculture’s Biggest Data Gaps appeared first on Global Ag Tech Initiative.
